claim_boundary: Necessary condition within the fixed-field, spherical radial-metric, leading collective-rotor model. It excludes shell energy and does not control the lapse, nonspherical stress, collective projection, higher-order rotation, or a rotating Einstein-Skyrme solution.
derivation: q<=beta implies A>=(1-beta)N. For the certified field held fixed, c_M[A]>=(1-beta)c_M[N] and c_I[A]<=c_I[N]/(1-beta). The wall constraint therefore contains positive e^-2 rest and e^2 Cbar rotational terms. AM-GM eliminates e.

theorem_result.claim_boundary: Necessary condition within the fixed-field, spherical radial-metric, leading collective-rotor model. It excludes shell energy and does not control the lapse, nonspherical stress, collective projection, higher-order rotation, or a rotating Einstein-Skyrme solution.
theorem_result.coupling_elimination: rest contribution scales as e^-2 and collective rotational contribution as e^2 Cbar; AM-GM removes e
